scripts.dev: concurrently -n auth,api,web -c yellow,blue,green "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:auth: cd auth && PORT=5001 npm run start
scripts.dev:api: cd api && PORT=4000 npm run start
scripts.dev:web: cd web && PORT=3001 npm run start
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd auth && npm install && cd ../api && npm install && cd ../web && npm install
